human_view.what_was_discovered: CHIRON recovered a 'geometric' generator and PROVED it by predicting held-out terms it never saw — exact equality, not a tolerance.
human_view.why_believed: VERIFIED generator 'geometric'. Recovered in EXACT arithmetic from the first 7 terms, this rule reproduces every term and predicts all 2 held-out terms exactly (== , not a tolerance). Compresses 109 bits to 13; MDL margin to the next model is 4 bits.
human_view.what_would_falsify: A single held-out term it failed to predict would break this.
human_view.residual: the generator reproduces the surface exactly; no residual.
